title: Surgical patch package; 12 live source snapshots + 4 patch-plane specs
public_claim: Red Team Tranche II surgical patch package is a source-snapshot and schema-change handoff.
distinctive_mechanism: It preserves RedTeamLabRoom.tsx snapshots, ALTER TABLE and CREATE TABLE schema work, live source snapshots, and patch-plane specifications so the implementation path can be audited at file and database levels.
use_value: It matters because it converts red-team doctrine into concrete source and database changes rather than leaving it as design prose.
